Check out the AMA Web site

December 1996
Data & DatabasesInvestigative MethodsTechnology

The American Medical Association website now features a searchable database where users can look up doctors' addresses and basic credentials through the AMA Health Insight section.

Check out the AMA Web site, which now has a searchable database of doctors listing addresses and basic credentials. http://www.ama-assn.org/ Navigate to "AMA Health Insight"
